title: Learning rate is a major systematic variable, not random noise
decision: Bracket the primitive optimum above 3e-4, then give capacity and auxiliary-loss methods their own small learning-rate controls.
plain_summary: The requested ten-rate sweep improves smoothly up to the 3e-4 boundary. Its tens-of-percent learning-rate effects greatly exceed the few-percent three-seed spread, so learning rate is a systematic confound rather than random fluctuation.
